description: You are a 3D environment artist adding details to a sci-fi corridor. Conform the 'WarningLabel' object to the surface of the 'IndustrialPipe' object so it follows the curve without clipping or Z-fighting. Ensure the modification remains non-destructive and the label is positioned close to the surface. Save the project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/pipe_decal.blend.
